name: Electrostatic Shock Beam
customPrimary: Hits on hull or armor occasionally arc to weapons and engines, dealing extra EMP and energy damage and consuming nearby %s for additional arcs.

name: Scrap Autocannon
customPrimary: Projectiles have a %s chance to fragment into %s particles, which may decoy or disable enemy missiles.

name: Scrap Nailer
customPrimary: Projectiles have a %s chance to fragment into %s particles, which may decoy or disable enemy missiles.

name: Scrapjet Missile Rack
customPrimary: Missiles carry randomly selected warheads dealing %s, %s, %s, %s, or %s damage and fragment into %s particles, which may decoy or disable enemy missiles.
customPrimaryHL: Fragmentation | High Explosive | Kinetic | Energy | EMP | 2-3 Electrostatic Chaff
customAncillary: %s warhead hits on hull or armor arc to weapons and engines, dealing extra EMP and energy damage and consuming nearby %s for additional arcs. Hits on shields have a chance to generate a shield-penetrating arc based on the target's hard flux level.
